$description: Component tokens for Mobile Checkbox component with unchecked, checked, and indeterminate states. Supports default, hover, pressed, focused, disabled, and error states. Includes icon tokens for checkmark and indeterminate (minus) icons. Figma Reference: Node ID 126-27150

$component.name: Checkbox
$component.description: A mobile checkbox component for selection states. Supports three functional states: unchecked (empty), checked (with checkmark icon), and indeterminate (with minus icon). Square shape with subtle rounded corners. Includes comprehensive interaction states for user feedback.
$component.structure: Square container with border and optional background fill. Contains checkmark icon when checked or minus icon when indeterminate. Supports focus outline and error border states.

sizes.xs: Extra small size for compact mobile interfaces - 12px
sizes.sm: Small size for compact mobile interfaces - 16px
sizes.md: Medium size (commonly used default for mobile) - 20px
sizes.lg: Large size for prominent mobile checkboxes - 24px

variants.unchecked: Empty checkbox with border, no background fill or icon
variants.checked: Filled checkbox with checkmark icon indicating selected state
variants.indeterminate: Filled checkbox with minus icon indicating partial/indeterminate selection

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, settings panels, data entry interfaces, list selections, multi-select scenarios, agreement checkboxes, filter panels
usage.features: Three-state selection (unchecked/checked/indeterminate), focus indicators, hover feedback, pressed/active states, disabled state, error validation, icon support (checkmark and minus)

size.$comment: Checkbox container size - square dimensions for each size variant

xs.description: Mobile checkbox size for xs variant - 12px

sm.description: Mobile checkbox size for sm variant - 16px

md.description: Mobile checkbox size for md variant - 20px

lg.description: Mobile checkbox size for lg variant - 24px

border.$comment: Border properties for mobile checkbox - radius and width

xs.description: Mobile checkbox border radius for xs size - 2px

sm.description: Mobile checkbox border radius for sm size - 4px

md.description: Mobile checkbox border radius for md size - 4px

lg.description: Mobile checkbox border radius for lg size - 4px

default.description: Mobile checkbox border width for default state - 1px

check.$comment: Checkmark icon color tokens - white on blue background for checked state, grey for disabled

default.description: Mobile checkbox checkmark icon default color - white/base - #ffffff

disabled.description: Mobile checkbox checkmark icon disabled color - gray/200 - #eaecf0

indeterminate.$comment: Indeterminate (minus) icon color tokens - white on blue background for indeterminate state, grey for disabled

default.description: Mobile checkbox indeterminate (minus) icon default color - white/base - #ffffff

disabled.description: Mobile checkbox indeterminate (minus) icon disabled color - gray/200 - #eaecf0

Mobile checkbox focus shadow - focus 2xs primary 100 for visual focus indicator
